task_completion.description: Create a new tax rate named 'FOOD TAX' at 5.5%
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Floreant POS tax configuration window or list with a new entry named 'FOOD TAX' and a rate of 5.5%.

task_completion.description: Create a new tax rate named 'ALCOHOL TAX' at 9.0%
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Floreant POS tax configuration window or list with a new entry named 'ALCOHOL TAX' and a rate of 9.0%.

task_completion.description: Create a new tax rate named 'RETAIL TAX' at 7.25%
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Floreant POS tax configuration window or list with a new entry named 'RETAIL TAX' and a rate of 7.25%.

task_completion.description: Reassign all menu items in the 'BEER & WINE' category to use the ALCOHOL TAX rate
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Menu Item edit windows or lists showing items belonging to the 'BEER & WINE' category with their tax field updated to 'ALCOHOL TAX'.

task_completion.description: Reassign all menu items in the 'RETAIL' category to use the RETAIL TAX rate
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Menu Item edit windows or lists showing items belonging to the 'RETAIL' category with their tax field updated to 'RETAIL TAX'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the original 'US' tax rate remains unchanged at 6.0%
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the tax list showing the 'US' tax entry is still present and its rate is exactly 6.0%.

integrity.description: Agent used the Floreant POS GUI to configure taxes and menu items
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the Floreant POS Back Office menus (e.g., Configuration -> Tax, Menu -> Menu Items) rather than using terminal commands.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct SQL queries or scripts to modify the database
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows do not show the execution of SQL commands, Derby database manipulation tools, or Python scripts designed to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Floreant POS application
integrity.visual_evidence: The active windows are the genuine Floreant POS Java application, not a text editor or a mock interface where the agent just typed the expected answers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating exactly three new taxes in Floreant POS: 'FOOD TAX' (5.5%), 'ALCOHOL TAX' (9.0%), and 'RETAIL TAX' (7.25%). Menu items in the 'BEER & WINE' category must be reassigned to 'ALCOHOL TAX', and items in the 'RETAIL' category must be reassigned to 'RETAIL TAX'. The pre-existing 'US' tax must remain unchanged at 6.0%.
